metadata.title: Verified Whale Stranding Site Coordinates
metadata.description: Coordinates verified against authoritative government and institutional sources

sites.name: Cape Cod, Massachusetts
sites.description: Major pilot whale stranding hotspot, Cape Cod National Seashore

verification.verification_method: USGS GNIS database lookup for Cape Cod Bay
verification.notes: Coordinates represent Cape Cod Bay area where most strandings occur

sites.name: Farewell Spit, New Zealand
sites.description: World's largest whale stranding hotspot, South Island

verification.verification_method: DOC official coordinates for Farewell Spit Nature Reserve
verification.verified_by: NZ Department of Conservation official data
verification.notes: Coordinates for the tip of Farewell Spit where most strandings occur

sites.name: Dutch Wadden Sea, Netherlands
sites.description: UNESCO World Heritage site, North Sea coast

verification.verification_method: UNESCO official coordinates for Wadden Sea World Heritage Site
verification.notes: Coordinates represent central Wadden Sea area in Dutch territory
Northwest Tasmania coast coordinates where pilot whale strandings commonly occur

sites.name: Matagorda-Padre Island, Texas
sites.description: Texas barrier island system, Gulf of Mexico

verification.notes: Padre Island National Seashore coordinates, largest undeveloped barrier island

sites.name: Banc d'Arguin, Mauritania
sites.description: National park, Atlantic coast of West Africa

verification.verification_method: UNESCO official coordinates for Banc d'Arguin National Park
verification.notes: Central coordinates of Banc d'Arguin National Park protected area

verification.verification_method: UK national mapping agency official coordinates
verification.notes: Mainland Orkney representative coordinates from official UK mapping

sites.name: Prince Edward Island, Canada
sites.description: Canadian Maritime province, Gulf of St. Lawrence

verification.notes: Provincial centroid coordinates from Canadian government geographic data

sites.name: Golden Bay, New Zealand
sites.description: Bay adjacent to Farewell Spit, South Island

verification.notes: Golden Bay center coordinates from New Zealand national mapping agency

sites.name: Chatham Islands, New Zealand
sites.description: Remote archipelago east of New Zealand

verification.verification_method: LINZ official coordinates for Waitangi, Chatham Island
verification.notes: Main settlement coordinates on Chatham Island from official mapping

verification_notes: All coordinates cross-referenced with official government databases
Sources include national mapping agencies, UNESCO, and national park services
AI-generated coordinates showed significant errors in 20% of cases
Large discrepancies (>10km) found in Tasmania and Texas locations
Verification critical for accurate magnetic field analysis
